text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today's the Fan Fest... That is, today's the day my
life ends...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I can't tell my fans to have a bit of fun and let
bygones be bygones. That's not going to cut it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I really screwed up at the Kinko Sho with the way
I was acting. My former fans are going to
bombard me with questions until there's no trace
of me left...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
M-maybe you're right. In a way, this is an
opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I want to apologize to them, at the very least.
After that, I can live peacefully in some forgotten
corner of the Umamusume world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once all the other events are over, the
meet-and-greet commences. Soon, it's
Matikanefukukitaru's turn to take the stage.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
H-how am I supposed to interpret this
commotion? At least they aren't yelling at me, I
guess...

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru, could you tell us your goal
for this spring?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Urk... Just getting right to it, huh?! My goal for
the spring...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
To quietly enjoy some rice crackers on the
veranda and sip some tea. Nice and quiet-like.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, riiight... And what's your next goal after
that?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna catch a break here, am I?! What
should I do, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Why don't you just tell them?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What?! Are you serious?! Are you seriously
serious? Uuugh... If this goes sideways, it's on
you...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I'd like to make an announcement! This
spring, my goal—or, I should say—my dream is...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: To race in the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Eeek, I can't believe I just said that!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait, don't throw things at me! Let's keep the
venue nice and clean!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: W-wait, what's going on?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: People are clapping? B-but why?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Sounds good, Matikanefukukitaru! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You'd better make that wish come true! I'll come
and support you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Why are you all being so nice to me? After my
performance at the Kinko Sho... It was a disgrace.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I thought you were hilarious! It was so bad that it
was good. You were endearing... in your own way.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
We all have those moments—that feeling when
you think you've got it all in the bag, but you
don't. I found it pretty relatable.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Relatable? Does this mean you haven't
abandoned me yet?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
We're not gonna abandon you. I mean, you tried
so hard at the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I'll stick with you through thick and thin. I'm
gonna vote for you for the Takarazuka Kinen,
okay? Make sure you enter the race after that!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
W-wow, are you all... gods? Buddhas? I can't
believe people with this much mercy in their
hearts really exist...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! I'm crying, I'm sweating... All these fluids
are pouring out of me! I can't believe it...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... Thank you! I'm going to give this
another go.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Just like that time I desperately clambered up
that cliff to beg for good luck.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry about what happened, everyone. I lost
sight of myself!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I promise to try harder in the future. As proof, I'll
perform the sacred rite and squat 108 times! So
please go on easy on me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Warm laughter fills the venue.
Matikanefukukitaru goes on to secure a spot in
the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm going back to the basics and starting from
zero. I know I disappoint you sometimes, but
keep watching over me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her gods may have abandoned her, but her fans
were there to pick up the pieces. In the end,
Matikanefukukitaru manages to secure a spot in
the Takarazuka Kinen.
